sense.definition: the real-time delivery and playback of multimedia content over the Internet
the activity of posting a series of digital media files available for download over the Internet on regular basis

examples.x: Podcasting has become a great way for people to connect over niche topics.
He’s thinking about getting into podcasting as a way to share his expertise.

sense.definition: a digital audio program that is available for download or streaming on the Internet, typically produced in a series format covering a wide range of topics

examples.x: She listens to a history podcast on her way to work.
They launched a new podcast about technology trends.
His podcast features interviews with famous authors.
He subscribed to a weekly science podcast.
The podcast covers politics, culture, and social issues.

sense.definition: transcribed or translated words of the narrative or dialogues of a movie or TV show, appearing at the bottom of the screen to help deaf people or those who do not understand the language

examples.x: The foreign film had subtitles in English to help viewers understand the dialogue.
She turned on the subtitles while watching the documentary to catch every detail.
The DVD includes subtitles in multiple languages for international audiences.
Viewers with hearing impairments rely on subtitles to enjoy movies and TV shows.
The streaming platform allows users to customize subtitle settings for font size and color.

sense.definition: a broadcast of video or audio content over the Internet in real-time

examples.x: The company hosted a live stream of the product launch.
I watched the live stream of the concert last night.
He tuned in to the live stream of the sports game.
She shared a live stream of her cooking session with followers.
The conference will be available on a live stream for those who can't attend.
I missed the live stream, but the video is available online.

sense.definition: a system or service that allows users to access and watch video content at their convenience, enabling them to choose and play videos whenever they want rather than following a fixed broadcasting schedule

examples.x: I love using video on demand to watch movies whenever I have free time.
I watched the entire season in one weekend thanks to the video on demand feature.
With video on demand, I can catch up on my favorite TV shows whenever I want.
We subscribed to a video on demand service to have access to a wider range of films.

sense.definition: the delivery of video, audio, and other media content over the Internet directly to users, bypassing traditional distribution channels such as cable or satellite television providers

examples.x: I prefer watching my favorite shows on OTT platforms like Netflix rather than on regular TV.
Many people now use OTT services to catch up on episodes they missed during the week.
I switched to an OTT service because it has more content and is cheaper than cable.
OTT streaming gives you the freedom to watch on any device, whether it is your phone or TV.

sense.definition: a technique used in multimedia delivery over the Internet that dynamically adjusts the quality and resolution of the streaming content based on the viewer's network conditions and device capabilities

examples.x: I didn’t experience any buffering during the movie thanks to adaptive streaming.
My streaming app used adaptive streaming to give me the best quality without interruptions.
I noticed the video quality drop slightly when I switched to a slower network, thanks to adaptive streaming.
With adaptive streaming, I can watch shows without worrying about lag or buffering.

sense.definition: a platform or service that allows users to stream and access a wide range of audio, video, or other media content over the Internet

examples.x: I signed up for a streaming service to watch my favorite TV shows whenever I want.
She canceled her cable subscription and switched to a streaming service instead.
Many people prefer streaming services over traditional TV because of the convenience.
I discovered a new podcast on my streaming service today.

sense.definition: the process of temporarily storing and preloading data to ensure uninterrupted playback of streaming media

examples.x: The buffering issue made it hard to watch the live stream without interruptions.
The constant buffering ruined my experience watching the live stream.
The buffering stopped once I moved closer to the Wi-Fi router.
I had to wait for the buffering to finish before I could watch the full episode.
The buffering lasted for several minutes before the video started playing.

sense.definition: the sound or audible content in the form of music, speech, or other types of sound that can be recorded, played, or transmitted
a recording of sounds and images that are moving

examples.x: My friend shared a heartwarming video of her baby's first steps.
The teacher showed us an educational video about space exploration.
We enjoyed watching a video of a fireworks display on New Year's Eve.
We recorded a video of our family vacation at the beach.
We watched a video tutorial on how to bake a cake.

sense.definition: a personalized collection of media that allows individuals to keep track of movies, TV shows, or other content they intend to watch in the future

examples.x: I added that new action movie to my watchlist so I can watch it later.
She’s always updating her watchlist with the latest releases.
My watchlist is filled with shows I’ve been wanting to catch up on.
He has a huge watchlist, but he never seems to have enough time to get through it.
That series is at the top of my watchlist for this weekend.

sense.definition: the action of advancing or moving ahead through a recorded media file, such as a video or audio track, to a later point in the content

examples.x: I used the forward to skip ahead in the audiobook.

sense.definition: a function or action that allows you to quickly advance or skip forward through a recorded media file, such as a video or audio track, at a faster speed than normal playback
the process of reproducing or playing back recorded media, such as audio or video content
the online delivery of live or pre-recorded radio broadcasts over the Internet, allowing users to listen to a wide range of radio stations and programs using their connected devices

examples.x: I love listening to streaming radio while I work; it keeps me focused.
You can find all your favorite stations on streaming radio apps like Spotify and Pandora.
I was able to tune into a live sports event on streaming radio while driving.
Many people now prefer streaming radio to traditional radio because it offers more variety.

sense.definition: the action of temporarily stopping the playback of a media file, allowing users to resume from where they left off
the function or action of starting or initiating the playback of a media file

examples.x: She pressed play to start watching the movie.
The music began as soon as he hit play on his device.
The presentation will begin with the play of the introductory video.
He clicked play to initiate the video call with his team.

sense.definition: the quality and clarity of an image or video display
a specific platform or service that offers a collection of content, such as movies, TV shows, or live broadcasts, for streaming over the Internet
the automatic and continuous playback of content without requiring the user to manually start each item

examples.x: I turned off the autoplay feature because I prefer to choose when I start watching videos.
I didn't realize autoplay was on, so the next episode of the show started playing automatically.
Autoplay is useful for watching a whole playlist without needing to click every time.

sense.definition: the available options for how the content is presented on the screen, such as full screen, theater mode, picture-in-picture, and windowed mode

examples.x: The app has a special display mode for reading that reduces glare.
You can change the display mode of the website to full-screen for a better viewing experience.
My computer automatically adjusts the display mode when I plug in a second monitor.
The game switches to full-screen display mode when you start playing.

sense.definition: the display mode where the video or content occupies the entire screen of the device, maximizing the viewing experience

examples.x: I switched the video to full screen so I could see the details better.
You can press the icon in the corner to make the image full screen.
When I play games, I always use full screen for a more immersive experience.

sense.definition: a display setting that provides a larger and more immersive viewing experience by maximizing the video content and removing distractions from the screen

examples.x: When I watch videos on my tablet, I like using theater mode for a better experience.
I prefer theater mode during presentations because it gives a more professional look.
He clicked the theater mode button to make the video fill the entire screen.
I switched to theater mode so I could enjoy the movie without any distractions.
Theater mode on this app helps me focus on the content without the clutter of menus.

sense.definition: a feature that allows users to watch a video or content in a small window while simultaneously performing other tasks or browsing through different applications on the device

examples.x: I used the picture-in-picture feature to watch a tutorial while browsing online.
Picture-in-picture makes it so easy to follow a video call while looking at other documents.
I love how picture-in-picture lets me keep an eye on my favorite show while working.
With picture-in-picture, I can watch a movie and still respond to emails at the same time.
The picture-in-picture mode on my phone lets me check messages while watching a video.

sense.definition: a display setting that allows the video or content to be viewed in a resizable window, similar to other applications, enabling users to multitask and have better control over the viewing experience

examples.x: I usually watch videos in windowed mode while working on my laptop.
If you open the document in windowed mode, you can keep the browser open at the same time.
You can resize the window when it's in windowed mode, making it easier to multitask.
Windowed mode is useful when I need to chat with someone while still using a program.

sense.definition: an agreement or arrangement where an individual or entity pays a recurring fee or provides their contact information in exchange for access to content, services, or updates from a specific source, such as a website, online platform, or digital publication
someone who posts a series of digital media files available for download over the Internet on a regular basis
